response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of software development experience with highly relevant technical skills in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer tools. However, the candidate's background is strictly rooted in Individual Contributor (IC) and technical leadership roles. There is no evidence of the required 2+ years of formal people management, conducting one-on-ones, or leading organizational change, which are critical for this Level II Management position.
strengths: Deep expertise in developer tooling and testing infrastructure, including custom test runners and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated technical leadership and software craftsmanship through Staff Engineer roles and open-source contributions.
Solid mobile platform knowledge, having maintained iOS/Apple TV apps and built mobile device orchestration tools.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated people management experience, including direct reports and performance evaluations.
No evidence of strategic team-level roadmap planning or aligning team goals with broader organizational objectives.
Career trajectory is heavily focused on hands-on coding and architecture rather than full-time people leadership.
